refnamediv.refpurpose: Normalize image intensity using local statistics.

refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: out = imlocalnormalize(image) out = imlocalnormalize(image, window, epsilon)

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Subtracts a local mean, divides by a local standard deviation, and rescales the result to 0 through 1. This is useful for uneven illumination and local contrast enhancement.

refsection.title: Examples
